//: Tool allow-list baked into each teammate agent's frontmatter at `ctm init` time.
//default: Used for any agent name not listed under "agents" (incl. most custom tm-* agents).
//agents: Per-agent override, keyed by the generated agent name (the base set, or tm-<name> custom).
//format: Each value is either a comma-separated string or a JSON array of tool names.
//override: A project may override this per-agent by placing its own .claude/agent-tools.json in the target repo (see engine/agent-tools.sh for the precedence).
default: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, SendMessage, mcp__ide__getDiagnostics
//playwright: playwright-tester needs the Playwright MCP server; without it the agent is installed but can't drive a browser — see the roster note in SKILL.md.

agents.backend-dev: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, SendMessage, mcp__ide__getDiagnostics
agents.frontend-dev: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, SendMessage, mcp__ide__getDiagnostics
agents.playwright-tester: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, SendMessage, mcp__playwright__browser_navigate, mcp__playwright__browser_snapshot, mcp__playwright__browser_click, mcp__playwright__browser_type, mcp__playwright__browser_fill_form, mcp__playwright__browser_select_option, mcp__playwright__browser_press_key, mcp__playwright__browser_hover, mcp__playwright__browser_wait_for, mcp__playwright__browser_take_screenshot, mcp__playwright__browser_console_messages, mcp__playwright__browser_network_requests, mcp__playwright__browser_evaluate, mcp__playwright__browser_tabs, mcp__playwright__browser_resize, mcp__playwright__browser_close
